notes: fiscal_kpis was null for this chunk (KPIs appear only on chunk_001); no KPI rewrites.

All 5 events reviewed in order. Events 0001546417-25-000016 (2025-02-20), 0001546417-25-000010 (2025-02-13), 0001546417-25-000002 (2025-01-08), and 0001546417-24-000170 (2024-12-31) contain only 8-K item labels with no substantive text -> skipped as vague (4 of the 6 skips). All candidates are grounded in the 2025-02-26 earnings 8-K (EX-99.1 press release).

Remaining 2 skips were narrative items judged one-off or rule-banned: CEO/executive transition costs ('transition' is a banned state word; no rule-safe source noun) and one-time third-party strategic-initiative consulting fees (explicitly non-recurring, single-instance).

workforce_reduction (announced 2025-02-20 via the Reg FD 8-K) and brazil_operations_divestiture (completed 2024-12-30 via the Item 2.01 8-K) are evidenced from the earnings-release text because those 8-K events carry no content text in this chunk.
All evidence quotes were programmatically verified verbatim against the event content before writing this menu.
